speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. On the bodies of everyone who-- all the bodies that still remain here, as the body of Lorenzo is destroyed other than the glaive, you find 131 gold pieces across all those bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can sell them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Possibly, depending on where you take them. That's the low end. Because you got higher than a 12, you do find-- the bottom floor is a number of the-- the second basement floor, you find a plethora of torture implements. Plenty of brands and small blades and hooks. You find flaying knives. It's a terrible array. If you were to choose to take any, you could write down torture implements. Should you be so inclined. You do find on the bodies of the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shooting a Hostel sequel.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You did get the baseline 15 DC, though, in going through the upstairs chamber that you found to be Lorenzo's chamber. Through the bed, you find 15 gold pieces scattered in some of the shelves near the bed unit, beneath where there's the platter containing the remains of some young creature. Then beneath, tucked underneath the bed and up into the slats, you find a heavy leather bag of some kind. You pull it out, and what you find is--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the storage chests that are in various bunkers in the top floor, you also find a potion that looks like a weird, syrupy, quicksilver type of a liquid on the inside of this little glass vial and you find this receipt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Gimme gimme gimme!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It'll be good for our taxes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Service and payments to the Iron Shepherds. House Jagentoths. Who's Jagentoths?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We've heard that before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Keg has spoken. That's the opposing house to House Mardun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the house that sponsors The Iron Shepherds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: These are the receipts (gasp)-- these are the receipts of--!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of people!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Travel for hire, bribery--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this could take down the Jagentoths.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tools and materials, delivered goods polished.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Could take them down in a place that has law. But it may have some use, you don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Blackmail!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The heavy noise that draws you guys over to this involves collecting 101 platinum pieces that were in the bag-- (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I shake it, does it make any noise?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No noise.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll reach in and just grab the inside of it and turn it out, see if there's stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you pull the bag inside-out, it jolts away from one side of your grasp, and a bunch of things spill out of it onto the ground. (clattering, clanging)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: From the bag?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How'd you do that? What is that? What's in there? What was it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He just flipped it inside out!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, take all the hidden goodies inside. It's a piñata.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I have deep arcane ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it? What'd we get?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you pierce it? Is it ruined forever now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I just turned it inside out, and all this shit poured out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pick up a couple things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yer a wizard, Harry!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (Harry Potter voice) I'm a what? (Hagrid voice) And a thumpin' good one, I'd wager.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: In fact, you recognize it immediately. This is called a galley.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They're evil! Those are really evil!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The big villain for this campaign will become Mister Manacle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did the lady ever say anything when she was casting, or was it just touching?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was just casting a spell, and she wasn't always touching it necessarily. She was just near it, and sometimes would touch it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (growling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About two dozen teeth clatter to the ground, from varying backgrounds, and levels of decay. A meat hook: a handheld meat hook. Looks a bit rusted.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Gross.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a red gem  a well-carved red gem about that big, not quite a ruby, called a corundum gem. A sealed envelope-- a wax-sealed envelope, but as part of the seal there's a coin pressed into the seal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A special coin? What does the coin look like?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what it looks like.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fuck! Physical props!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He pushes it forward, and it comes to about 600 platinum pieces and 250 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, Mr. Gentleman, sir, we didn't catch you at a bad time, did we? It seems that you just stepped out of the shower, or something? Should we come back after you've dried yourself off and made yourself presentable?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the glimmer of confidence in his eyes sets into this glare for a second, and then he (laughs) "I'll be fine. Well, your contract is fulfilled. Ms. Mardun and I will take the week to re-establish our trade line, and I think you've earned every copper." He looks over his shoulder and two of his various goons come over with a heavy chest. (strained grunt) onto the table. It hits with a very mighty strike and the whole table shakes for a second. They open it: it is filled with gold and platinum coins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pay day!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing in, it's mostly platinum.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got hundreds, y'all!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He pushes it forward, and it comes to about 600 platinum pieces and 250 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, Mr. Gentleman, sir, we didn't catch you at a bad time, did we? It seems that you just stepped out of the shower, or something? Should we come back after you've dried yourself off and made yourself presentable?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pay day!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing in, it's mostly platinum.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got hundreds, y'all!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The remaining sum for the agreement you had made was 6250 gold pieces for both jobs being completed. He had paid some in advance and given you some funds, but this is the rest of the agreed upon amount.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the glimmer of confidence in his eyes sets into this glare for a second, and then he (laughs) "I'll be fine. Well, your contract is fulfilled. preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He pushes it forward, and it comes to about 600 platinum pieces and 250 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 3250 gold, it's platinum plus gold, around 600 platinum pieces times five.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Times five?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Times ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Times ten? Even better.
